task: v120 / 0.115.0 自动记忆与配置管家第一阶段

tooling_fallback.sequential_thinking: 当前会话未暴露该 MCP，使用本地结构化分析替代。
tooling_fallback.shrimp_task_manager: 当前会话未暴露该 MCP，使用 update_plan 与项目方案文档替代。
tooling_fallback.code_index: 当前会话未暴露该 MCP，使用 rg 与 Get-Content 替代。
tooling_fallback.exa: 本阶段不需要网络搜索；如后续需要，当前优先本地文档。

current_implementation.memory_profile: memory/profile.md stores long-term bullet facts via append_memory/read_profile.
current_implementation.experience_memory: memory/experiences.md stores reusable workflow bullets via append_experience/read_experiences.
current_implementation.directories: memory/directories.json stores aliases via /dir-add and list_common_directories.
current_implementation.apps: config/apps.local.json can override AppRegistry paths and aliases.
current_implementation.llm: config/llm.local.json is managed by /llm-config-init/check/set and masks API key in responses.
current_implementation.search: config/search.local.json is managed by /search-config-init/check/set and masks API key in responses.

similar_patterns: /authorization-status: standalone status descriptor plus Agent command/help/status integration.
/automation-status: aggregates local capability state and common directories.
/llm-config-check and /search-config-check: read-only config inspection without provider calls or API key echo.

key_questions.question: 第一阶段是否应自动写入配置？
key_questions.answer: 否。v108 要求普通对话先进入候选，不无脑写入长期配置；本阶段先做只读盘点和管理入口。

key_questions.question: 哪些数据源进入统一视图？
key_questions.answer: 长期记忆、经验记忆、常用目录、应用本地覆盖、LLM 本地配置、联网搜索本地配置。

key_questions.question: 如何验证不泄露敏感值？
key_questions.answer: 在 LLM/Search 本地配置写入假 API key，断言配置管家和 Agent 响应只显示已配置/未配置，不包含原文 key。

sufficiency_check.interface_contract: describe_memory_config_manager(paths: ProjectPaths) -> str; /config-manager-status and /memory-config-status return same read-only report.
sufficiency_check.technical_choice: Reuse existing storage readers and settings parsers; add one focused module instead of duplicating config commands.
risks: API key leakage in aggregated report.
Invalid JSON configs causing status command crash.
Over-expanding into automatic persistence before candidate/undo model exists.
verification: New unit tests for manager report.
Adjacent unittest and full unittest discovery.
